steps.title: Use the character contrast
steps.content: The underlined portion says Israel can be brave and daring but nevertheless often shows unusual patience and mildness. That detail appears just before he gives up on the land after the employer breaks the contract.

steps.title: Connect trait to outcome
steps.content: Choice A says Israel treasures the trait, which the text does not say. Choice C concerns his ability to farm, not his reaction to losing the land. Choice D focuses only on courage, missing his patience and mildness. The answer is B.
